title: Angels
content:
Came of old to houses lonely
        Men with wings, but did not show them:
    Angels come to our house, only,
        For their wings, they do not know them!
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Angels"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
